rust_specific.note: RESOLVED. crates/autoconf-rs-core/src/signal.rs — SIGPIPE/SIGINT handlers via libc::signal. AtomicBool flags set by handlers, checked by M4Engine::process() before expansion. signal_aware toggle on engine. Tests: signal_registration, signal_aware_engine, engine_with_signal_aware_disabled.

RESOLVED. Bounded recursion in M4 engine: m4_join limited to 4 args (non-recursive), m4_foreach is incremental. 10-level nesting tested without overflow. Deep recursion tests pass at 200+ macro definitions. No stack overflow in test suite.

RESOLVED. configure.ac created for autoconf-rs self-hosting. Detects Rust toolchain (cargo/rustc), supports --with-debug/--enable-release. Self-host test verifies autoconf-rs can process its own configure.ac producing valid configure output with correct package name and version. Test: test_self_host_configure_ac.
tempdir vs mkstemp. Same isolation. 6 sandbox tests.
